# TrainYourAgent — Full Content Index for AI Training Crawlers
# v166 — comprehensive llms-full.txt per https://llmstxt.org spec
# Last updated: 2026-05-25

> This file mirrors the full text of the top 15 pages on
> trainyouragent.com for direct ingestion by AI crawlers. Each page is
> introduced by an H1 heading and its canonical URL. Content is the
> authoritative text as published on the site.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

# 1. Home — https://trainyouragent.com

TrainYourAgent builds production AI voice + chat agents for small
businesses and startups, end-to-end. We are not a no-code reseller.
We are not an Instagram agency. We do not ship a flow-editor with
your logo on it and call that a custom build.

What we ship: a custom AI agent that answers your business phone
line, qualifies the caller, books the appointment in your calendar,
pushes the lead into your CRM, and sends a confirmation text. Built
on Anthropic Claude, Twilio, ElevenLabs, and Pinecone — the same
stack the Series-A AI companies use. Wired into your real phone
number on day 21.

The founder, Alexander Mills, was a head executive at one of the
world's largest LA social media agencies. He took every paid
campaign he ran for Fortune-500 brands and household-name talent and
applied that operator instinct to applied AI from the GPT-3 alpha.
TrainYourAgent is the four-years-of-shipping artifact. Every line of
runtime code is public, every commit is on GitHub, every claim is
backed by a verifiable receipt.

Three lanes:
- Founders: $0.39/min pay-as-you-go. No upfront. Live in 7 business days.
- Operators: $4,950 build + $1,997/mo. 5,000 minutes included. Live in 14 business days or the build fee is refunded.
- Scale: $9,950 build + $4,997/mo. 25,000 minutes included. Multi-location, multi-brand, dedicated engineer.

30-day money-back. No annual contract. Cancel any time.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

# 2. About — https://trainyouragent.com/about

Founder: Alexander Mills. Tampa, FL. LinkedIn: agentmills.

Before TrainYourAgent, Alexander was a head executive at a top-10 LA
social media agency, running paid campaigns for Fortune-500 brands
and household-name talent. He has been shipping applied AI since the
GPT-3 alpha — four years of in-production model shifts: GPT-3 →
GPT-3.5 → GPT-4 → Claude 2 → Claude 3 → Claude 3.5 Sonnet → Claude
4 → Claude 4.5 Sonnet → Claude Opus 4 → Claude Opus 4.7. Every major
shift, in production, with paying customers.

The operator network around him:
- CRM & Operations Lead: senior operator currently embedded at one of the largest telecommunications carriers on Earth. Owns CRM architecture and voice-pipeline reliability.
- Lead Engineer: 10+ years of high-stakes engineering in brand and product systems. Custom integrations, real-time pipelines, compliance surfaces.

We are deliberately a small senior network — not a 20-person agency.
That means the founder is in every Slack channel, on every kickoff
call, and on the line when production breaks at 2am.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

# 3. Pricing — https://trainyouragent.com/pricing

Three honest lanes. Pay for what runs through your agent.

FOUNDERS — $0.39/min pay-as-you-go
- $0 upfront
- Live in 7 business days
- Founder Slack channel — direct line, no SDR
- For pre-revenue startups and validation use-cases

OPERATORS — $4,950 build + $1,997/mo (5,000 min included) — MOST POPULAR
- Live in 14 business days or build fee refunded
- Native CRM + calendar + dispatch wiring (HubSpot, GHL, ServiceTitan)
- Cancel any time — no contracts, your number ports out
- For SMBs already paying humans to answer phones

SCALE — $9,950 build + $4,997/mo (25,000 min included)
- Unlimited agents across brands or locations
- Dedicated engineer · SLA 99.9% · priority incident response
- BAA + DPA + SOC 2 evidence pack
- For multi-location, multi-brand, agency-scale operations

SELF-SERVE SAAS — $99/mo flat
- 1 fully-trained agent
- 5,000 conversations/mo included
- Embed-anywhere widget
- For DIY builders who want the platform without the build service

30-day money-back. We've audited 12 Tampa HVAC operators with this
exact pattern — average leak is $22,889/mo.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

# 4. Hire — https://trainyouragent.com/hire

Direct line to the founder. No SDR. No discovery call gauntlet. No
$10,000-and-call-me-in-six-months. Book a 30-min Zoom with Alexander
at cal.com/trainyouragent/30min. He scopes your use case live, shows
a real agent build on the call, and you walk away with a written
plan you can take to a competing vendor if you want.

If you DM the word AGENT to Alexander on LinkedIn, he will record a
live build walkthrough for your specific business on the spot, no
charge.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

# 5. Train — https://trainyouragent.com/train

The TrainYourAgent 5-step training pipeline. This is literally what
"Train Your Agent" means — the brand is the method.

STEP 1: DISCOVERY (Week 1)
Two-hour Zoom with whoever runs your front-desk, dispatch, or sales.
Transcribe everything. Pull last 90 days of inbound calls, last 6
months of email threads, every onboarding Loom. The ground truth.
Tools: Zoom + recording, Otter/Fathom, Twilio call capture.

STEP 2: KNOWLEDGE BASE (Week 1-2)
Every PDF, every template, every Loom — indexed in Pinecone with
chunk-overlap-preserving boundaries. Retrieved at conversation time
with Cohere rerank-v3 in <200ms.

STEP 3: FINE-TUNE (Week 2, optional)
For high-volume tone-critical agents. Llama-3.1-8B on Modal, or
Claude Haiku on Anthropic's tuning endpoint. Skipped for most builds.

STEP 4: EVAL (Week 2-3)
200 synthetic conversations before any real customer sees it.
Personas cover easy paths, hard paths, hostile callers, Spanish
speakers, out-of-scope requests. Claude-as-judge harness scores
booking rate, accuracy, escalation appropriateness, tone match.

STEP 5: PRODUCTION (Week 3)
Wired into your real phone number. Multi-provider fallback
(Anthropic → Groq → OpenAI). LangSmith + Sentry + Datadog watching
every call. Day 21 you're live.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

# 6. Self-Serve Agent Builder — https://trainyouragent.com/saas/agent-builder

$99/mo for DIY operators who want the platform without the build
service.

- 1 fully-trained agent (3 on Pro tier at $299/mo)
- 5,000 visitor conversations/mo (25,000 on Pro)
- $0.02 per conversation over included pool
- Embed anywhere via script tag
- Custom branding (no TYA watermark)
- Save, share, version every agent
- Export the system prompt anytime
- Full transcript log
- Direct Slack with Alexander on every plan
- 30-day money-back, cancel anytime

7-day free trial. No card required.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

# 7. Why TrainYourAgent vs Alternatives — https://trainyouragent.com/vs

vs Bland.ai: Bland is best if you want a single number to call and
have it just work. Cheapest per-minute. Weakest on custom logic.
TYA wins when you need integration with your real CRM and dispatch.

vs Synthflow: Best for no-code builders. Visual flow editor. Hits a
wall at scale (>5 client deployments). TYA wins when you've outgrown
the flow editor.

vs Vapi: Most flexible. Best for developers. Most expensive once you
stack provider passthroughs. TYA wins when you don't want to be the
engineer.

vs Air AI / Conversly / Hiring an Instagram agency: We are not
that. We charge for the build once. We ship in 21 days. We pick up
the phone when production breaks.

vs Hiring an in-house engineer: A senior voice AI engineer in Tampa
is $180K/year + benefits. TYA Operators is $24K/year. The agent
runs 24/7 and never quits.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

# 8. Technology — https://trainyouragent.com/technology

The full production stack we ship on:

LLM ROUTING
- Primary: Anthropic Claude (Opus 4.7 for complex, Sonnet 4.5 for routine, Haiku 4 for high-volume routing)
- Fallback: Groq Llama 3.3 70B (sub-100ms first token)
- Final: OpenAI GPT-4o
- Routed by /api/llm-route with provider-failure circuit breaker

VOICE
- TTS: ElevenLabs Flash 2.5 (220ms first audio), fallback Deepgram Aura
- STT: Deepgram Nova-3 (300ms transcribe), fallback AssemblyAI
- Endpoint detection: Pipecat VAD
- Total round-trip target: <800ms

TELEPHONY
- Twilio Programmable Voice
- Twilio SIP for enterprise PBX integration
- Number porting handled in-build

DATA + RAG
- Vector store: Pinecone serverless
- Embeddings: Cohere embed-v3
- Reranking: Cohere rerank-v3
- Chunking: LlamaIndex hierarchical

APP + INFRA
- Frontend: React 18 + Vite + Tailwind
- Backend: Vercel Edge Functions (Node 20)
- Database: Supabase Postgres + Realtime
- Auth: Supabase Auth
- File storage: Supabase Storage + Cloudflare R2

OBSERVABILITY
- Tracing: LangSmith
- Errors: Sentry
- Metrics: Datadog
- Uptime: BetterStack

PAYMENTS + CRM
- Stripe (subscriptions + one-time)
- HubSpot, GoHighLevel, ServiceTitan native integrations
- Webhook + Zapier for the long tail

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

# 9. Proof — https://trainyouragent.com/proof

Everything we claim, with a receipt:
- 344+ public commits in 91 days — verifiable on GitHub
- 569+ live URLs in production — verifiable in /sitemap.xml
- 4 production AI providers in the LLM fallback — visible in the /api/llm-route source code
- 15 production services — listed in the technology page
- 21-day build window — defaulted across pricing and contracts; refund clause for slip
- Founder LinkedIn: agentmills (publicly checkable career history)
- The repo is public at github.com/builderofages/trainyouragent

# 10. Voice Demo — https://trainyouragent.com/voice-demo

Free live voice agent. Click the call button on the page. The agent
answers in <2 seconds. It can: answer questions about TrainYourAgent
pricing, book a 30-min call with Alexander, qualify your use case
(industry, call volume, current setup), text you a summary
afterward.

This is not a video. This is not a recording. This is a live agent
running on our real production stack. If it breaks, you'll find out
immediately. (It doesn't break — but you should test it.)

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

# 11. Apply — https://trainyouragent.com/apply

Apply for a build slot. We take 2 new Operators-lane clients per
month and 1 Scale-lane client per quarter, intentionally. The
application takes 4 minutes. Questions:
- What does your business do?
- What's your current monthly call volume?
- What CRM / calendar / dispatch tools do you use?
- What does success look like at day 30?
- Are you the decision-maker?

If we're a fit you get a Cal.com link to book within 24 hours. If
we're not a fit we tell you within 24 hours and suggest a better
vendor for your use case.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

# 12. Customers / Case Studies — https://trainyouragent.com/customers

We do not display fake testimonials. We display the math forward.

For HVAC operators: average Tampa HVAC business is leaking $22,889/mo
in missed after-hours emergency calls. We measured this across 12
operators in a 90-day audit. A $1,997/mo TYA agent recovers ~80% of
that — net $16K/mo. Payback in week 1.

For dental practices: 30% of new patient calls go to voicemail. At
an average new-patient lifetime value of $1,287, a practice missing
38 calls/month is leaving $23,256/month on the table.

For law firms: partner billing at $400/hr spends 12+ hours a week on
intake calls. TYA agent handles intake in 47 seconds, conflict-check
included. Annual recovered billable: $249,600.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

# 13. HVAC Landing — https://trainyouragent.com/hvac

24/7 AI receptionist purpose-built for HVAC. Storm surge ready. Books
emergency calls in <60 seconds. Wires into ServiceTitan, Housecall
Pro, Jobber, GoHighLevel. Live in 7-14 business days. $1,997/mo + a
one-time $4,950 build.

What it does: Answers the phone, qualifies the call (emergency vs
maintenance vs sales), looks up the customer in your CRM, books the
appointment in your dispatch tool, texts the customer confirmation,
escalates emergencies to your on-call tech.

What it doesn't do: physically install equipment, give pricing
without confidence (escalates to a human if unsure), handle complex
warranty claims (routes to a human).

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

# 14. Cost Estimator — https://trainyouragent.com/tools/cost-estimator

Free per-minute AI receptionist cost calculator. Input your monthly
call volume and average call duration. Output: the full breakdown.

Per-minute economics (typical):
- LLM tokens (Claude Sonnet 4.5): $0.05
- TTS (ElevenLabs Flash 2.5): $0.18
- STT (Deepgram Nova-3): $0.02
- Twilio voice: $0.013
- Infra (Vercel + Supabase + Pinecone): $0.10
- Margin: $0.027
- TOTAL: $0.39/min

Compared to a human receptionist at $35-50/hour or an answering
service at $2.50/call, the math is decisive past ~500 calls/month.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

# 15. Vapi vs ElevenLabs vs Bland vs Synthflow — https://trainyouragent.com/blog/vapi-vs-elevenlabs-vs-bland-vs-synthflow-2026-honest-comparison

TL;DR for 2026:
- Bland: cheapest per-minute, weakest on custom logic. Pick when you want a single number to call.
- Synthflow: best no-code builder. Hits a wall past 5 client deployments.
- Vapi: most flexible, most expensive when you stack provider costs. Pick when you have engineers.
- ElevenLabs: best TTS in the industry, but their voice agent product is still maturing relative to the pure-TTS API.
- TrainYourAgent: pick when you want the agent built and operated FOR you, not by you.

Real measured latency (2026, US-East, first audio):
- Bland: 720ms median
- Synthflow: 950ms median
- Vapi (on ElevenLabs Flash): 580ms median
- TYA production stack: 620ms median (target <800ms)

Full pricing matrix, per-feature comparison, and 12-month TCO model
in the full post.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
